title: Price's Candles Set of 3 Large Jar Candles - Frosted Fir, Holiday Spice, White Winter | Long-Lasting, Clean-Burning Scented Candles for Home | 450-Hour Burn Time Candle Bundle Gift for Women & Men
features: Long-Lasting Large Scented Candles: Each candle delivers an impressive burn time of up to 150 hours, providing a total of 450 hours of soothing fragrance, perfect for relaxing evenings and festive gatherings.
Reusable Eco-Friendly Candle Jars: These stylish large jar candles come in high-quality glass jars that can be reused as decorative storage or home accessories after the candle has finished burning.
Even, Smoke-Free Clean Burn: Made with premium-quality wax and natural cotton wicks, these long-burning scented candles ensure a smoke-free, even, and clean burn with consistent fragrance throughout.

Seasonal Festive Fragrances: The set features Frosted Fir (fresh pine and winter woods), Holiday Spice (warm cinnamon and clove), and White Winter (crisp, snowy freshness) — perfect scents to create a cozy festive atmosphere.

Luxury Candle Gift Set For All Occasions: This beautifully packaged scented candle set makes an ideal gift for women and men, perfect for birthdays, housewarmings, holidays, weddings, or simply enhancing your home ambiance.
